text: I was really hoping to get my money back for that blender I bought last week. It didn't even work right out of the box, and I can't believe I spent a whole paycheck on it! Also, my cat keeps staring at it like it's the enemy. Can you help me with this refund? It's kind of urgent since I need that cash for groceries now.
I'm trying to upload my files for the project but it keeps saying there's an error. Can you help me figure out what's going on? I don't know what to do!

I recently attempted to access my account, but I seem to have forgotten my password. I followed the reset instructions as indicated on your website, yet I have not received any email to proceed with the reset. It’s been several hours now, and I am unsure of what steps to take next. Can you please assist me with this issue? I would like to regain access to my account as soon as possible.
I received the wrong item, and I also think the packaging was not eco-friendly which is disappointing.
I need to get my money back for the item I ordered. It didn’t arrive at all.
I am experiencing some issues with the software update on my device. It seems to be stuck and not functioning properly. Could you assist me in resolving this problem at your earliest convenience?
I shouldn't be requesting a refund since I didn't intend to buy this, but I need my money back.
My app keeps crashing every time I open it, even after the last update. Also, I bought that fancy coffee yesterday, but it was just okay. Why is the app not working?

I recently purchased a set of garden tools from your site, and while I was excited to use them, I found that the shovel was missing from the package when it arrived. Furthermore, I have also come across some online forums discussing similar experiences with missing items, which has made me wonder if there is a larger issue at play. While I understand that mistakes happen, I would appreciate it if you could initiate a refund for the entire set, as I now lack the necessary tool to complete my gardening tasks effectively. I look forward to your prompt response regarding this matter.
I can't log into my account. The password reset link isn't working. Can you help?
my app keeps crashing when I try to open it. any ideas?
I keep getting an error when I try to save my progress, but it seems to save occasionally? Not sure what's going on.
I can't log in. Password reset link not coming.

I’m really upset because I thought I was getting a deal, but instead I was charged for something I didn’t even order. Can I get my money back, please? It’s order #12345, but the details on your site are just confusing.

I'm really curious, is there any chance that you might introduce options for on-premises hosting in the near future? It would be such a game-changer for those of us who prefer having control over our data.
the app keeps crashing, tried reinstalling but still doesn't work.
